chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.63 of 2024 M/s E.F.U. Life Assurance Ltd. Versus Mst. Amber Kazim & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 448/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 359/24 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 360/24 Dated: 27.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Urgency granted and the matter is taken up. The impugned order dated 24.01.2024 seeks compliance of order dated 17.03.2024 in relation to an amount recorded therein to be deposited. By virtue of impugned order Nazir was only directed to approach E.F.U. i.e. appellant so as to secure deposit of the said amount and nothing else. The main order dated 17.03.2022 is not challenged before us. Today not even counsel for the appellant is in attendance. He was also called absent on the last date. There is no intimation either. Petition in the circumstances is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
